project.name: FlowMark
project.description: FlowMark anchors money-streaming commitments to HACD Stack formation records — immutable, PoW-backed proof that a payment stream started.

asset.utility_summary: Each FLOW unit represents one share of a StreamMark receipt pool formed through a HACD Stack lot, while the unique HACD name acts as a permanent on-chain StreamMark receipt ID. Holders can anchor a money-streaming commitment to a verifiable PoW formation record and share a public proof page at launch.

copy.headline: Streaming proof, formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: FlowMark issues FLOW — a hybrid Stack Asset that anchors money-streaming commitments to PoW-backed formation records no platform can rewrite.
copy.short_description: FLOW is formed across 256 HACD lots at 50 HAC each. Each lot forms 10,000 FLOW and one StreamMark receipt identity. Total supply is 2,560,000 FLOW. No inflation. No hidden allocation. Formed on-chain.
copy.risk_disclosure: FLOW is a utility Stack Asset, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. Future utility (GrowStreams auto-anchoring, revenue-share distributions, receipt marketplace) depends on development. Formation cost is non-refundable. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review. Not financial advice.

notes: Generated by HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill for FlowMark (FLOW).
All parameters marked as draft. Issuer confirmation required before Launchpad publication.
Hybrid FT+NFT: FLOW is the fungible receipt-pool balance, the unique HACD name is the StreamMark receipt ID (non-fungible). Both produced by one Stack action.
Designated-first phase: first 32 lots Stacked by issuer/designated address to seed genesis StreamMark receipts; remaining 224 lots public. 32 + 224 = 256 = total_hacd_lots.
GrowStreams auto-anchoring, revenue-share distributions, and receipt marketplace are planned only — must not be promised in public copy.
Maximum 10 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
designated_address set to issuer's Hacash address 15j5fHZzL8Qkzi7YBtChf2GDfM6RJvUht7 for the first 32 genesis lots.
project.website = live GitHub Pages demo URL (https://yusizer.github.io/flowmark/).
Build on HACD bounty (Wizz, by GrowStreams) submission — quest on growstreams.xyz/app/projects/HACD to be completed before final submission.
